name: XAUUSD_M5_AsiaLondonBreakout_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) expansion of a contained Asia-session range (00:00-06:00 UTC) produces directional follow-through when the breakout candle body exceeds 1.2x ATR, yielding positive expectancy over 200+ trades.

signals.entry_long: price closes >= AsiaHigh + 0.5*ATR(14) AND candle_body >= 1.2*ATR(14) AND time in [07:00,10:00] UTC AND 0.5 <= (AsiaHigh-AsiaLow)/ATR(14) <= 2.0
signals.entry_short: price closes <= AsiaLow  - 0.5*ATR(14) AND candle_body >= 1.2*ATR(14) AND time in [07:00,10:00] UTC AND 0.5 <= (AsiaHigh-AsiaLow)/ATR(14) <= 2.0

rules: only first valid breakout per day

exits.stop_loss: opposite side of Asia range OR 1.5*ATR(14), whichever is tighter
exits.time_stop: close after 24 M5 bars (2 hours) if neither hit
